properties.body:
AEGEAN SEA.
GUNNERY. MISSILES.
DNC 09.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 0530Z TO SUNSET DAILY
   WEDNESDAYS THRU FRIDAYS 01 JAN THRU 31 DEC,
   SATURDAYS 01 JAN THRU 31 MAR AND
   01 NOV THRU 31 DEC:
   A. IN AREA BOUND BY
      35-36.00N 024-07.00E, 36-18.00N 024-07.00E,
      36-18.00N 025-59.00E, 36-25.00N 026-12.00E,
      36-16.00N 026-40.00E, 35-36.00N 026-41.00E,
      35-31.00N 024-11.00E.
   B. WITHIN 1000 METERS OF 35-32.00N 024-13.00E.
   C. WITHIN 1000 METERS OF 35-28.00N 024-11.75E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 01 JAN 17.
